summary: Frontend testing of self-service password change feature on Portal page. 6/7 tests passed. Found minor bug in error handling when wrong current password is submitted.

ui_bugs.issue: Error toast shows 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' instead of 'Aktuelles Passwort ist falsch' when wrong current password is entered

passed_tests: Portal shows 'Passwort ändern' button next to 'Abmelden' (Y position diff: 0px - perfectly aligned)
Click 'Passwort ändern' button -> inline form appears with 'Aktuelles Passwort' and 'Neues Passwort (min. 6 Zeichen)' fields
Enter correct current password + new password 'NeuTest789' -> success toast 'Passwort wurde geändert' displays
Form closes automatically after successful password change
Logout and login with new password 'NeuTest789' succeeds
Cleanup: Password successfully changed back to 'Test1234!'
failed_tests: Wrong current password error toast - Shows 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' instead of expected 'Aktuelles Passwort ist falsch'
action_items: LOW PRIORITY: Fix error handling in Portal.jsx handleChangePassword - the response body may be read twice causing the stream error. Consider cloning the response before reading or handling the error more gracefully.
critical_code_review_comments: The handleChangePassword function in Portal.jsx (lines 56-74) has a potential issue: when the response is not OK, the error message extraction may fail if the response body has already been consumed elsewhere or there's a network issue. Consider using res.clone().json() for safety or wrapping the json() call in a try-catch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Self-service password change feature fully functional. User can change their own password from Portal page (root '/') via inline form. data-testid attributes: change-pw-btn, change-pw-form, current-pw-input, new-pw-input, confirm-change-pw-btn. Minor bug exists in error handling - when wrong password is entered, the error toast shows a JavaScript error instead of the backend's error message 'Aktuelles Passwort ist falsch'. Core password change flow works correctly.

portal_page_password_change: change-pw-btn - Toggles password change form visibility
change-pw-form - Container for password change form
confirm-change-pw-btn - Submit button for password change
